stories.text: As a Kitchen Employee, I want to see the orders with their status, so that I am aware of the progress of each order.

json.text: As a Kitchen Employee, I want to see the orders with their status, so that I am aware of the progress of each order.

means.text: see the orders with their status

ends.text: I am aware of the progress of each order

stories.text: As a Kitchen Employee, I want to have an overview of all orders at a glance, so that I cannot miss any relevant orders.

json.text: As a Kitchen Employee, I want to have an overview of all orders at a glance, so that I cannot miss any relevant orders.

means.text: have an overview of all orders at a glance

ends.text: I cannot miss any relevant orders

stories.text: As a Kitchen Employee, I want to receive only the products of an order, so that I do not get confused by other irrelevant products.

json.text: As a Kitchen Employee, I want to receive only the products of an order, so that I do not get confused by other irrelevant products.

means.text: receive only the products of an order

ends.text: I do not get confused by other irrelevant products

stories.text: As a Kitchen Employee, I want to see special requests to be shown together with the product they are concerned about, so that I know if I have to prepare a product in a special way

json.text: As a Kitchen Employee, I want to see special requests to be shown together with the product they are concerned about, so that I know if I have to prepare a product in a special way

means.text: see special requests to be shown together with the product they are concerned about

ends.text: I know if I have to prepare a product in a special way

stories.text: As a Kitchen Employee, I want to have the order number shown together with its related products, so that I am aware of which order the products are coming from.

json.text: As a Kitchen Employee, I want to have the order number shown together with its related products, so that I am aware of which order the products are coming from.

means.text: receive a notification when a new order is received

ends.text: I am aware of the new order

json.text: As a Kitchen Employee, I want to receive a notification if the customer makes changes after the order is already paid, so that I know that there are changes to an order.

means.text: receive a notification if the customer makes changes after the order is already paid

ends.text: I know that there are changes to an order

stories.text: As a Ticket Master, I want to label new orders as 'incoming orders', so that incoming orders can be separated from orders with a different status.
